items.headline_ai: Blackstone Private Credit raises monthly distribution 4.8% to $0.22 per share
items.snippet: BCRED increased its monthly distribution to $0.22/share from $0.21, representing a 10.6% annualized yield based on June 30, 2023 NAV of $24.86/share.

items.headline_ai: Blackstone names Brad Marshall Global Head of Private Credit, Jonathan Bock co-CEO of BDCs
items.snippet: Blackstone promoted Brad Marshall to Global Head of Private Credit Strategies and named Jonathan Bock, former CEO of Barings BDC, to serve alongside him as co-CEO of BCRED and BXSL

8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blackstone Private Credit raises monthly distribution 10.5% to $0.21 per share
items.snippet: BCRED increased its monthly distribution to $0.21/share from $0.19, representing a 10.2% annualized yield based on October NAV of $24.60/share.

items.headline_ai: Blackstone Credit raises BCRED monthly distribution to $0.19, BXSL quarterly to $0.60
items.snippet: Blackstone Credit raised BCRED's monthly distribution to $0.19/share and BXSL's quarterly distribution to $0.60/share.

items.headline_ai: Blackstone Private Credit special dividend set at $0.07 per share on strong earnings
items.snippet: BCRED set its previously declared special distribution at $0.07/share for each class, up from the initial $0.05 estimate, due to strong earnings and the positive impact from rising

items.title: 8-K — Unregistered Sale of Equity · Regulation FD Disclosure · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blackstone Private Credit declares special dividend of at least $0.05 per share
items.snippet: BCRED declared a special distribution of excess undistributed NII of at least $0.05/share plus additional estimated undistributed NII available as of the August 21, 2022 record dat

items.title: 8-K — Unregistered Sale of Equity · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Regulation FD Disclosure · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blackstone Credit names Abby Miller chief accounting officer and treasurer of BDCs
items.snippet: Blackstone Credit appointed Abby Miller as Chief Accounting Officer and Treasurer of both BCRED and BXSL.

8-K — Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blackstone Credit BDCs appoint Michelle Greene to boards of trustees
items.snippet: Blackstone Private Credit Fund and Blackstone Secured Lending Fund appointed ESG leader Michelle Greene to their Boards of Trustees effective May 2, 2022.

items.headline_ai: Blackstone Credit BDCs appoint Vik Sawhney to boards of trustees

items.headline_ai: Blackstone Private Credit breaks escrow with $814M in net proceeds
items.snippet: BCRED broke escrow as of January 7, 2021 with approximately $814M in net proceeds from its continuous public offering, issuing 32,560,141 shares.
